## Testing

- [ ] `make gate` passes (build, vet, test, gofmt)
- [ ] `go test -race ./...` (for daemon/agent/concurrency changes)
- [ ] Added/updated regression tests for any bug fix
- [ ] Manual verification (describe what you ran and observed)

## Checklist

- [ ] No credentials, tokens, transcripts, `.env`, or `~/.eigen` data committed
- [ ] No project-local credential-loading paths added
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior/flags/config changed
- [ ] Change preserves local-first safety and explicit user control
